title: American Cream Fritter Pancakes
description: A delightful breakfast treat that brings together the sweetness of pancakes and the crunch of fritters.

ingredients.name: Pillowy American Pancake Mix
ingredients.notes: Make sure to choose a mix with buttermilk

instructions: Follow the pancake mix instructions to make the batter.
Add heavy cream to the batter and mix until smooth.
Heat a non-stick pan with butter or oil over medium heat.
Drop 1/4 cup of the batter into the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Flip the fritters and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Dust the fritters with powdered sugar and serve hot.
